title: The Girl from Yesterday
original_title: Cô Gái Đến Từ Hôm Qua
overview: A teenage boy causes problems on an everyday basis. He falls in love with a transfer student and becomes close to her, but he keeps thinking about his first love from early childhood that he couldn't confess his feelings to.
